final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a muscular athlete performing a deadlift in a professional gym environment.

Style/medium: photorealistic fitness photography, raw documentary style with grit and texture
Composition: medium shot from low side angle, 50mm lens, capturing the tension in the back and arms during peak lift
Subject: muscular athlete with defined muscle striations, visible sweat droplets on skin, veins prominent on forearms, intense focused expression, chalk dust on hands
Scene/backdrop: industrial-style gym interior with exposed concrete walls, black iron racks, rubber flooring, minimal equipment visible
Lighting/mood: cool-toned overhead LED lighting with subtle rim light, high contrast shadows emphasizing muscle definition, raw masculine energy
Color palette: cool steel blue and concrete gray as base, warm skin tones as anchor, desaturated industrial accents
Materials/textures: glistening sweat on skin, rough concrete texture, matte black metal, rubber mat grain
Avoid: soft lighting, warm color grading, over-processed skin, plastic appearance, 8K stuffer words
